description: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight of the development and performance of internal control.

subcriteria.name: board_charter
subcriteria.reference_text: Board of Directors charter document defining oversight responsibilities, required qualifications, and independence requirements. Charter specifies majority independent members and segregation from management roles.

subcriteria.name: board_meetings
subcriteria.reference_text: Board meeting minutes showing quarterly or annual meetings where security posture, risk assessment results, audit findings, and compliance status are reviewed. Agenda items include security metrics and incident reports.

subcriteria.name: security_committee
subcriteria.reference_text: Security steering committee or audit committee with charter defining roles and responsibilities for security oversight. Committee reviews third-party audit reports and regulatory findings for internal control deficiencies.

subcriteria.name: board_expertise
subcriteria.reference_text: Board members have documented qualifications and skills relevant to security and technology oversight. Annual review of board member backgrounds against charter requirements. External consultants or subcommittees supplement expertise as needed.

mismatch_signals.reason: User access management is not board governance or oversight evidence.
Software deployment controls are not board oversight evidence.
